serverInfo.name: databricks-mcp-server
serverInfo.description: MCP server for Databricks REST API — notebook management, job execution, cluster inspection

tools.name: importNotebook
tools.title: Import Notebook
tools.description: Create or overwrite a Python notebook in the Databricks workspace. Use this to upload generated DPE SDK extraction notebooks before execution.

tools.name: exportNotebook
tools.title: Export Notebook
tools.description: Read and return an existing notebook from the Databricks workspace to inspect its current content.

tools.name: createJob
tools.title: Create Job
tools.description: Create a Databricks job linked to a notebook. Returns job_id for subsequent execution.

tools.name: runJob
tools.title: Run Job
tools.description: Trigger an immediate run of a Databricks job. Returns run_id to monitor progress.

tools.name: getJobRun
tools.title: Get Job Run Status
tools.description: Poll the current status and result of a Databricks job run by run_id. Use to monitor extraction progress.

tools.name: listClusters
tools.title: List Clusters
tools.description: List all available Databricks clusters in the workspace. Use to identify preconfigured compute for notebook execution.

tools.name: getCluster
tools.title: Get Cluster Details
tools.description: Get full details of a Databricks cluster including state, Spark version, installed libraries, and environment variables.
